info.description: This is the API server for GoMino.
info.title: GoMino API

get.description: Get details of a specific community

post.description: Authenticate user with email and secret
Register a new user with email, nickname, and secret
Send a validation code to the email
Create a blog post accessible globally (only for admins/Astranet team)

get.description: Get list of threads for the user or public threads

post.description: Create a new chat thread

get.description: Get details of a specific chat thread

post.description: Update details of a chat thread
Mark all messages in a thread as read

get.description: Get list of members in a chat thread

post.description: Invite users to a chat thread
Disallow members to invite others
Allow members to invite others
Transfer thread ownership to another member
Disable view-only mode for a thread
Enable view-only mode for a thread
Join a specific chat thread
Set alert options for a thread
Set background image for a thread
Assign co-host role to a member

get.description: Get list of messages in a chat thread

post.description: Send a new message to a specific chat thread
post.summary: Send a message to a thread

delete.description: Delete a specific message from a thread

post.description: Create a new community with the given details

get.description: Get a list of communities the user has joined

post.description: Upload media (image/video) and convert to AVIF

get.description: Get public user profile information

post.description: Update user profile details
Reply to a comment on the user's wall

delete.description: Delete a comment from the user's wall

get.description: Get comments on the user's wall

post.description: Add a comment to the user's wall

get.description: Get list of users the target user is following
Get list of users following the target user

post.description: Follow the target user

get.description: Get moderation logs for the community
Get a list of blogs created by a specific user in the community

post.description: Create a blog post within a specific community

get.description: Get details of a specific blog post

post.description: Update details of a specific blog post

get.description: Get list of threads for the user or public threads

post.description: Create a new chat thread

get.description: Get details of a specific chat thread

post.description: Update details of a chat thread
Mark all messages in a thread as read

Transfer thread ownership to another member

Enable view-only mode for a thread
Join a specific chat thread

Assign co-host role to a member

post.description: Send a new message to a specific chat thread
post.summary: Send a message to a thread

delete.description: Delete a specific message from a thread

Leave a specific community

get.description: Get a list of recent blogs in the community
Get public user profile information

post.description: Promote a user to leader role

Transfer agent status to another user
Unban a user from the community
